title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: 10-question warmup that covers basics of variables, scope, arrays, and ES6 syntax.

questions.question: Which keyword declares a block-scoped variable that can be reassigned?
Which Array method returns a new array with elements that pass a condition?
The expression `const fn = () => 42;` defines what kind of function?
Which operator spreads array elements into a new array literal?
Which value is considered falsy in JavaScript?
What does `const { name } = user;` do?
options: Creates a new object named user
Destructures the name property from user
Adds a name property to user

questions.question: Which statement about `const` is true?
options: It must be initialized at declaration

questions.question: How do you convert a JSON string to an object?
What does `Array.isArray(value)` return when value is an array?
